docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHODAYARI, LOUISE BOAS COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-01-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED; JURY TRIAL SET; NOTICE MAILED FILED BY DEFENDANT LAMOUREUX, MICHAEL JURY TRIAL SET FOR NOV-01-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAMOUREUX, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1050 NORTH POINT #503 $4,122.28 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,122.28, STAYED UNTIL NOV-22-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, 5:00 PM AS TO POSSESSION ONLY. IF DEFT PAYS $1000 BY 11/17, PLTF WILL STAY EXECUTION TO 5PM 11-30-95. NO FURTHER STAYS. MONEY JDMT STAYED PROVIDING DEFT MAKES PAYMENTS - SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR DETAILS.
